original_snippet_context: A description of exchange rate fluctuations and banking transactions.
relevant_quote: As taxas baixas do cambio provocaram a baixa de titulos, tendo por isso func-cionado receioso o mercado de cambio.
justification: This describes market reactions to low exchange rates without expressing an opinion on the Caixa de Conversão itself or advocating for any particular monetary policy.  It is simply an observation about exchange rate dynamics.
